payload.title: Fix session-capture skill mount to use enhanced version
payload.description: The read-only .skills/ mount has the old session-capture SKILL.md (transcript + journal only). The enhanced version (CC API posts, action items, ACTION-TRACKER, docs drift) lives in .claude-skills/session-capture/SKILL.md but isn't what Cowork loads. Need to figure out how to sync the workspace skill to the mounted location, or change how the skill is loaded.
